title: Hezbollah claims 26 attacks including 2 inside Israel — first cross-border claims since ceasefire
snippet: Hezbollah claims 26 attacks on Friday, including targeting Nahariya military base and Meron military base inside Israel. First time the group has publicly claimed cross-border strikes since the April 16-17 ceasefire. Israeli military says one rocket intercepted, rest fell in open areas. Significant escalation marking effective end of ceasefire's cross-border restraint.
tag_reason: First Hezbollah cross-border claims inside Israel since ceasefire — qualitative escalation
